ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the period */,
  "asi" REAL /* Accumulation/Distribution Index (ASI) value */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval of the data (e.g., 1-minute, 5-minute, daily) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., exchange, provider) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price, accounting for splits and dividends */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount for the period */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio for the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, index, commodity) */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the asset */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the asset */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is traded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the asset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the asset's metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_asset_type FOREIGN KEY ("asset_type") REFERENCES asset_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  "is Tradable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the asset type is tradable */,
  "is Index" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the asset type is an index */,
  "is Commodity" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the asset type is a commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, risk analysis) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report if stored as a file */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
